user.title: KMA Weather (기상청 동네예보)
user.description: Enter your data.go.kr short-term forecast service key. Use the DECODED key ('일반 인증키 Decoding') and wait 1-2 hours after issuance for it to activate. Leave the location blank to use your Home Assistant home coordinates.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check that you used the DECODED key, that 1-2 hours have passed since issuance, and that the operations (ultra-now/ultra-forecast/short-forecast) were requested.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach data.go.kr. Check connectivity and retry.
